module_o.description: This component is part of the PANDA/BAMBU IP LIBRARY

NP_functionality.VERILOG_PROVIDED: assign done = r && br; assign reg_out = (br && ~r) | (~br && r);

NP_functionality.VERILOG_PROVIDED: assign done = &r && br; assign reg_out = r + br;

module_o.description: This component is part of the PANDA/BAMBU IP LIBRARY

NP_functionality.VERILOG_PROVIDED: assign o = 0; assign empty = ~i;

module_o.description: This component is part of the PANDA/BAMBU IP LIBRARY

NP_functionality.VERILOG_PROVIDED: assign o = (~i[0] && i[1]); assign empty = ~i[0] && ~i[1];
